headline: India Bans Banks From Crypto Transactions Again

article.title: India's central bank revives push to isolate banks from crypto: Report
article.summary: The Indian central bank reportedly urged lawmakers to keep banks insulated from crypto and private stablecoins while preserving room for regulated tokenization.

headline: Ireland Seizes 500 Bitcoin, Total 1,500 BTC Confiscated

article.title: Irish authorities seize another 500 Bitcoin, bringing 2026 total to 1,500 BTC
article.summary: Irish authorities recovered 500 Bitcoin in criminal proceeds, bringing the total seized by the Criminal Assets Bureau to about $92 million in BTC for 2026.

headline: Air India Delays Spark $15B Jet Order Shift

article.summary: Airlines in the Persian Gulf are looking to snap up earlier delivery slots for Boeing Co. and Airbus SE aircraft that may be freed up as Air India Ltd. discusses potentially deferring some orders, according to people familiar with the matter.

headline: OpenAI Sells $42B Stake to US Government

headline: Russia Targets Digital Ruble Launch by September 2024
